title: Hello World (Vanilla)
description: In this demo, we set data in, and then get data from, a Store object. We're using keyed values (not even tabular data!), so this is about as simple as it gets.

files.index.html:
<!doctype html>
<html lang="en">
  <head>
    <meta charset="utf-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1" />
    <title>Hello World (Vanilla)</title>
  </head>
  <body>
    <script type="module" src="/src/main.js"></script>
  </body>
</html>
